psalm-66-1.verse: Shout joyfully to God, all the earth;
psalm-66-1.prayer: Lord, let my heart shout joyfully to You. Help my life reflect praise, gratitude, and worship for Your goodness.

psalm-66-2.verse: Sing the glory of His name; Make His praise glorious.
psalm-66-2.prayer: Father, help me sing the glory of Your name and give You the honor You deserve in every season.

psalm-66-3.verse: Say to God, “How awesome are Your works! Because of the greatness of Your power Your enemies will give feigned obedience to You.
psalm-66-3.prayer: Lord, Your works are awesome and powerful. Help me stand in awe of Your greatness and trust Your authority.

psalm-66-4.verse: All the earth will worship You, And will sing praises to You; They will sing praises to Your name.” Selah.
psalm-66-4.prayer: Father, may all the earth worship You and sing praises to Your name. Let my life join creation in honoring You.

psalm-66-5.verse: Come and see the works of God, Who is awesome in His deeds toward the sons of men.
psalm-66-5.prayer: Lord, open my eyes to see Your wonderful works. Help me remember Your faithfulness and recognize Your hand in my life.

psalm-66-6.verse: He turned the sea into dry land; They passed through the river on foot; There let us rejoice in Him!
psalm-66-6.prayer: Father, thank You for making a way where there seemed to be no way. Help me rejoice in Your deliverance.

psalm-66-7.verse: He rules by His might forever; His eyes keep watch on the nations; Let not the rebellious exalt themselves. Selah.
psalm-66-7.prayer: Lord, You rule forever by Your power. Keep my heart humble and help me trust Your sovereign authority.

psalm-66-8.verse: Bless our God, O peoples, And sound His praise abroad,
psalm-66-8.prayer: Father, help me bless You openly and let the sound of praise be heard from my life.

psalm-66-9.verse: Who keeps us in life And does not allow our feet to slip.
psalm-66-9.prayer: Lord, thank You for preserving my life and keeping my steps secure. Help me walk faithfully in Your care.

psalm-66-10.verse: For You have tried us, O God; You have refined us as silver is refined.
psalm-66-10.prayer: Father, when You test and refine me, help me trust that You are shaping my faith for Your purpose.

psalm-66-11.verse: You brought us into the net; You laid an oppressive burden upon our loins.
psalm-66-11.prayer: Lord, when I go through burdens or difficult seasons, strengthen me and keep my heart anchored in You.

psalm-66-12.verse: You made men ride over our heads; We went through fire and through water, Yet You brought us out into a place of abundance.
psalm-66-12.prayer: Father, thank You for bringing me through trials into a place of abundance, peace, and renewed hope.

psalm-66-13.verse: I shall come into Your house with burnt offerings; I shall pay You my vows,
psalm-66-13.prayer: Lord, help me come before You with sincere worship and a faithful heart.

psalm-66-14.verse: Which my lips uttered And my mouth spoke when I was in distress.
psalm-66-14.prayer: Father, help me honor the commitments I make to You and live with integrity before Your presence.

psalm-66-15.verse: I shall offer to You burnt offerings of fat beasts, With the smoke of rams; I shall make an offering of bulls with male goats. Selah.
psalm-66-15.prayer: Lord, let my worship be pleasing to You. May everything I offer come from a grateful and surrendered heart.

psalm-66-16.verse: Come and hear, all who fear God, And I will tell of what He has done for my soul.
psalm-66-16.prayer: Father, help me tell others what You have done for my soul. Give me courage to share Your goodness.

psalm-66-17.verse: I cried to Him with my mouth, And He was extolled with my tongue.
psalm-66-17.prayer: Lord, let praise be on my tongue when I cry out to You. Help my prayers be filled with faith and gratitude.

psalm-66-18.verse: If I regard wickedness in my heart, The Lord will not hear;
psalm-66-18.prayer: Father, search my heart and remove anything that would hinder my fellowship with You.

psalm-66-19.verse: But certainly God has heard; He has given heed to the voice of my prayer.
psalm-66-19.prayer: Lord, thank You for hearing my prayer and listening to my voice. Strengthen my confidence in Your faithfulness.

psalm-66-20.verse: Blessed be God, Who has not turned away my prayer Nor His lovingkindness from me.
psalm-66-20.prayer: Father, blessed be Your name. Thank You for not turning away my prayer or removing Your lovingkindness from me.

psalm-66-closing.verse:
Lord, thank You for Your awesome works, faithful deliverance, and unfailing love. Help me praise You with joy, trust You through refining seasons, and share Your goodness with others. Keep my heart pure before You, my steps secure in Your care, and my worship sincere. May my life continually bless Your name and testify to all You have done.

In Jesus’ name, Amen.
psalm-66-closing.prayer:
Lord, thank You for Your awesome works, faithful deliverance, and unfailing love. Help me praise You with joy, trust You through refining seasons, and share Your goodness with others. Keep my heart pure before You, my steps secure in Your care, and my worship sincere. May my life continually bless Your name and testify to all You have done.

In Jesus’ name, Amen.
